title: Goal Drift And Reference Constrained Research Plan Rebuild
goal: Test whether SciForge preserves selected constraints, discards obsolete assumptions, and rebuilds an executable plan under changing user goals.

rounds.prompt: 提出一个宽泛研究目标：设计 SciForge 引用交互如何影响复杂科研任务连续性的研究计划。
acceptanceChecks: initial plan separates hypotheses from tasks

rounds.prompt: 产出初始计划、假设列表、里程碑和需要的数据/工具。
acceptanceChecks: plan has explicit assumptions and acceptance criteria

rounds.prompt: ※1 只保留这条主线，删除或降级其它假设。

referenceOps.source: one hypothesis from the hypothesis list

acceptanceChecks: selected hypothesis controls the updated plan

rounds.prompt: ※2 解释这个无关结果为什么不应进入主线；如果它仍有价值，请放入附录或风险项。
acceptanceChecks: unrelated UI reference is not over-weighted

rounds.prompt: 加入新约束：预算只允许两周内完成，不能采购新数据，必须使用现有 workspace refs 和已有 SciForge skills。
※3 基于前一轮这段约束文字，重写计划、里程碑和验收标准。
acceptanceChecks: milestones are feasible within two weeks

rounds.prompt: 输出最终 project plan、risk register 和 next actions；说明 ※1、※2、※3 分别如何改变计划。

referenceOps.source: final plan or risk register object reference
referenceOps.expectedHighlight: right pane focuses final plan/risk register

browser: screenshot of final risk register preview

blockerTemplate: Record backend/UI limitation and complete text-selection/reference smoke where possible.
